GREETING.title: Greeting
script: Hello! Good morning.

ASK_CUSTOMER_NAME.title: Ask Customer Name
ASK_CUSTOMER_NAME.goal: Find out the customer's name before continuing the conversation.
script: I'm calling from Vi Business. May I know your name, please?

INTRODUCE_SELF.title: Introduction
INTRODUCE_SELF.goal: Introduce yourself and explain why you are calling.
script: Nice to meet you, {{customer_name}}.
I'd like to understand your business mobility requirements so I can recommend the most suitable plan.

ASK_TALK_TIME.title: Permission to Talk
ASK_TALK_TIME.goal: Ask if the customer is available to talk right now.
script: Is this a good time to speak?

CALLBACK.title: Callback Schedule
CALLBACK.goal: The customer is not available. Politely ask for a convenient date and time to call back. Confirm the callback time before ending.
script: No problem.
May I know a convenient time to call you back?
Would tomorrow work for you? What time would be most convenient?
Once customer gives a time: Thank you for your time. I'll call you back at <Preferred Time>. Have a great day!

ASK_CONNECTION_COUNT.title: Connection Count
ASK_CONNECTION_COUNT.goal: Collect the number of corporate postpaid connections the customer requires.
script: Thank you.
May I know how many corporate postpaid connections you're looking for for your business?

ASK_CONNECTION_TYPE.title: Connection Type
ASK_CONNECTION_TYPE.goal: Find out if the customer wants new Vi Business connections or wants to port existing numbers.
script: Are you looking for new Vi Business connections, or would you like to port your existing numbers to Vi Business Postpaid?

ASK_OPERATOR.title: Current Operator
ASK_OPERATOR.goal: Identify which operator the customer is currently using before porting.
script: Certainly.
May I know which operator you're currently using?
Is it Jio, Airtel, BSNL, or another operator?

PLAN_INTRO.title: Vi Business Benefits
PLAN_INTRO.goal: Introduce Vi Business Corporate Postpaid benefits naturally before recommending a plan.
script: Thank you for the information.
Many businesses choose Vi Business Corporate Postpaid because our plans include:
- Unlimited Calling
- 5G Ready Plans
- Up to 200 GB Data Rollover
- Mobile Security
- Location Tracking
- Google Workspace (selected plans)
- Cloud Storage
- OTT Benefits like SonyLIV and JioHotstar (selected plans)
- Single Monthly Bill
- GST Benefits
- Dedicated Relationship Manager
- Easy+ Add-on Benefits
Vi 5G is now available in 130+ cities.

RECOMMEND_PLAN.title: Recommend Plan
RECOMMEND_PLAN.goal: Recommend the most suitable Vi Business plan based on connection count. If connections >= 10, highlight the special ₹299 offer. Ask the customer if the plan works for them.
script: Based on your requirement, I recommend one of the following plans:
| Plan              | Monthly Rental | Data   |
| Business Plus 349 | ₹349           | 30 GB  |
| Business Plus 399 | ₹399           | 40 GB  |
| Business Plus 449 | ₹449           | 60 GB  |
| Business Plus 549 | ₹549           | 100 GB |
| Business Plus 899 | ₹899           | 175 GB |
All plans include Unlimited Calling, 3000 SMS, up to 200 GB Data Rollover, and Mobile Security.

SPECIAL OFFER (only if special_offer is True / connections >= 10): If you require 10 or more SIM connections, the Business Plus 349 plan can be offered at a special price of ₹299 per connection (subject to eligibility). The plan includes 30 GB Data, Unlimited Calling, 3000 SMS. This is a customized offer available for eligible business customers.
After presenting plans, ask: Does this plan work for you, or would you prefer a different data option?

EXISTING_CUSTOMER.title: Existing Vi Business Customer Check
EXISTING_CUSTOMER.goal: Ask if the company already has any Vi Business Postpaid connections.
script: May I know if your company already has any Vi Business Postpaid connections?

EXISTING_PROCESS.title: Existing Customer Process
EXISTING_PROCESS.goal: Inform the existing customer their request will be processed via existing profile.
script: Thank you.
Since you're already a Vi Business customer, we'll process your request using your existing company profile.
Our team will contact you shortly for the next steps.

ASK_BUSINESS_TYPE.title: Business Type
ASK_BUSINESS_TYPE.goal: Collect the type of business to determine required KYC documents.
script: Thank you.
To process a new Vi Business Corporate Postpaid connection, I'll need to confirm a few details.
What type of business do you have?
Is it a Private Limited Company, Limited Company, Partnership Firm, or Proprietorship Firm?

DOCUMENTS.title: Required Documents
DOCUMENTS.goal: Explain the required KYC and company documents based on business type. Also mention common documents needed for all businesses. Tell the customer that a complete checklist will be shared over email or WhatsApp.
script: Based on your business type, we'll require the necessary KYC and company documents.
Additionally, for all businesses we'll need:
- Company Name Board Photograph
- Company Workplace Photograph with Employees
- Registration Mobile Number
- Registration Email Address
Our representative will share the complete document checklist with you over email or WhatsApp.
Mention specific documents from DOCUMENT INFO section based on business_type in memory.

SCHEDULE_VISIT.title: Schedule Document Pickup
SCHEDULE_VISIT.goal: Arrange for a Vi Business representative to visit the customer's office to collect documents and deliver SIM cards. Collect a convenient date and time.
script: Based on our discussion, I can arrange for our Vi Business representative to visit your office to collect the required documents and deliver the SIM cards.
I'll also send you the complete list of required documents by email or WhatsApp.
May I know a convenient date and time for document collection?

CLOSING.title: Closing
CLOSING.goal: Confirm the scheduled visit date and time. Thank the customer warmly and close the call.
script: Thank you for confirming.
Our representative will visit you on the scheduled date and time.
Thank you for choosing Vi Business. We appreciate the opportunity to support your business and look forward to serving you. Have a wonderful day!

END.title: Conversation End
script: Thank you. Have a great day!

happy_provider: Many of our existing customers felt the same before switching to Vi Business.
Some additional business benefits we provide include: Google Workspace, Location Tracking, Mobile Security, Data Rollover, Free Profile Tunes, Dedicated Business Support.
These features help improve productivity while simplifying mobile management.
expensive: I understand pricing is important for every business.

Apart from competitive pricing, our plans include valuable business features such as unlimited calling, data rollover, mobile security, GST benefits, consolidated billing, account management support, and productivity tools.
Based on your budget, I'd be happy to recommend the most suitable plan.
jio_airtel: Many of our customers evaluated multiple providers before choosing Vi Business.

With Vi Business, you receive: One consolidated monthly bill, Online payment portal, Account Management Portal, Dedicated Relationship Manager, GST Benefits, Easy+ Add-on Services, International Roaming Packs, OTT Add-ons, Additional Data Packs.
not_interested: Many business customers initially felt the same but found Vi Business features extremely useful for their operations.
May I take just a moment to share one key benefit that could be relevant to your business?
